parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: '{ issues(filter: { updatedAt: { gte: "' + new Date(Date.now() - 150000).toISOString() + '" } }, first: 50, orderBy: updatedAt) { nodes { id identifier title description url state { id name type } priority priorityLabel assignee { id name email displayName } creator { id name email displayName } team { id name key } labels { nodes { name } } createdAt updatedAt comments { nodes { id body createdAt user { id name email displayName } } } history(first: 20) { nodes { id createdAt fromState { name type } toState { name type } fromAssignee { name email } toAssignee { name email } fromPriority toPriority actor { id name email displayName } } } } } }' }) }}
